description: Determine the exact UTC times for the end of evening civil twilight and the beginning of morning civil twilight at Anchorage International Airport (PANC: 61.1743° N, 149.9962° W, Altitude 46 m) for November 16, 2024. With the atmosphere and ground/landscape disabled to obtain true geometric altitude, identify the exact minutes the Sun's altitude crosses -6° 00' (descending for evening and ascending for morning). Capture screenshots of both events and save a logbook verification report to /home/ga/Desktop/twilight_log.txt. The report must include the airport name, the UTC times for both twilight events, and a statement confirming the atmosphere and landscape were disabled.
